name: custom_sidebar_panel
description: Home Assistant 自定义侧边栏面板 - 在侧边栏添加自定义 iframe 面板

scripts.update:mdi: npm install @mdi/font && npx shx cp -r node_modules/@mdi/font/preview.html custom_components/custom_sidebar_panel/www/mdi/ && npx shx cp -r node_modules/@mdi/font/css/* custom_components/custom_sidebar_panel/www/mdi/css/ && npx shx cp -r node_modules/@mdi/font/fonts/* custom_components/custom_sidebar_panel/www/mdi/fonts/
